scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.bootstrap: npm run infra:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run seed:demo
scripts.bootstrap:provider: npm run infra:up && npm run db:migrate && npm --workspace=backend run seed
scripts.test:launch-smoke: npm --workspace=backend run seed:smoke && node ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test frontend/tests/e2e/launch-smoke.spec.ts frontend/tests/e2e/live-score.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1
